reason: TRACEABILITY_MATRIX.md establishes bidirectional FR ↔ Design Element ↔ Test Case traceability. All 3 FRs and 3 NFRs from SRS.md have downstream links; 36 ACs covered; 67 test cases (after R5 TC expansion) match the SRS scope. Architecture constraints (no_shell_true, atomic_writes_only) and 3 env vars (TASKQ_HOME/TASKQ_TASK_TIMEOUT/TASKQ_RETRY_LIMIT) are traced. Known minor gaps: §1.1/§1.3 'design elements' count (9) vs actual unique DEs per FR (8/10) is off-by-one; backtrace table enumeration is 62 rows not 67 — both low-severity arithmetic issues, contract is satisfied.
